title: The purpose of Evangelion was to sell music
display_title: The purpose of Evangelion was to sell music
wikitext:
[]: The purpose of Evangelion was to sell music?             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Sun Jul 28, 2019 5:13 pm https://twitter.com/somebadideas/status ... 5558111234 " He’s also given the greenlight to make a new series, set up to sell music merchandising. Anno wants to explore a theme of ‘not running away’." What's this about?

[]: Re: The purpose of Evangelion was to sell music?             Quote Post by Kakyoku » Sun Aug 11, 2019 9:11 pm The purpose of an entire franchise to sell music? Definitely not. If that were the case then it’d probably be of less quality, spanning the whole series.

[]: Re: The purpose of Evangelion was to sell music?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Aug 12, 2019 9:16 am Just from a quick glance over the thread and profile, I wouldn't put all too much weight on what this guy is saying in regards to Eva. I guess he's famous or something(...?) (judging by the bio, never heard of him), but he doesn't quote a lot of sources for the more risque claims, some of which I've never heard of before. It was an interesting read to be sure, but at the end of the day, it's just one of many opinions on the internet

[]: Re: The purpose of Evangelion was to sell music?             Quote Post by 天使 | Nyo | 天使 » Fri Sep 06, 2019 11:20 am Well, regardless. The music of Evangelion is REALLY GOOD (I mean, most anime soundtracks are decent, so I guess that's not saying much.) But I'd totally be buying the CDs up.
